handEditPolicy: forbidden; use protocol-codegen from Rust protocol sources
failClosedPolicy: Consumers must stop on missing/unknown contract compatibilityVersion, schema mismatch, or a breaking contract change without a migration note; do not paper over by copying generated DTOs or importing generated file paths.
pinningGuidance: asha-testing should pin @asha/contracts by package path plus ASHA git commit for conformance artifacts until registry/version publishing exists; future consumers, including the human-facing asha-demo, should also record compatibilityVersion in artifacts they own.
